author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2' Unveils Additional Staff, Second Teaser Promo
Netflix Japan revealed additional staff members and a second teaser promotional video for the Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 anime on Tuesday. The 10-episode anime series is scheduled to premiere worldwide on Netflix in Fall 2026. Staff Assistant Director: Naoto Uchida (Mob Psycho 100 III episode director) Chief Animation Director: Ichigo Kanno (Dungeon Meshi animation director) Music: Tsuneo Imahori (Trigun, Hajime no Ippo) Kai Ikarashi (Tengoku Daimakyou episode director) is directing the anime at T...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Katainaka no Ossan, Kensei ni Naru II' Announces Additional Cast
The official website of the Katainaka no Ossan, Kensei ni Naru (From Old Country Bumpkin to Master Swordsman) anime series revealed additional cast and an action promotional video for the second season on Monday. The new season adapting Shigeru Sagazaki's fantasy adventure novel is scheduled to premiere on July 8 at 11.45 p.m. on TV Asahi, followed by AT-X and BS Asahi. Cast Hanoy Cressa: Takashi Kondou (91 Days) Kuriu Rybark: Hiromu Mineta (Katainaka no Ossan, Kensei ni Naru) Prim: Mami Uc...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Tongari Boushi no Atelier' Second Season Announced
The official website for the Tongari Boushi no Atelier (Witch Hat Atelier) television anime announced on Tuesday that a second season is in production. Produced by BUG FILMS, the first season adapting Kamome Shirahama's fantasy manga premiered with the first two episodes on Tokyo MX and BS11 on April 6. Crunchyroll and Netflix simulcasted the anime with multiple subtitles and dubs. Shirahama began serializing the manga in Morning Two magazine in July 2016. Kodansha published the 16th volum...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Himekishi-sama no Himo' Reveals Additional Staff, Teaser Promo for Winter 2027
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Tooru Shirogane's Himekishi-sama no Himo (The Kept Man of the Princess Knight) light novel revealed additional staff, a teaser visual (pictured), and teaser promotional video on Monday. The anime series will premiere in January 2027. Staff Action Director: Hibiki Yamaguchi (Toaru Kagaku no Railgun T animation director) Prop Design, Monster Design: Recommendation, Inc. author: MyAnimeList News
text:
New 'King of Prism' Movie 'Tri-Star Act' Announced
The KING OF PRISM SUPER LIVE Prism☆Tours! event announced a new anime movie in the franchise, subtitled Tri-Star Act, on Sunday. The official site also revealed the returning staff and cast, a teaser visual (pictured), and an announcement video. Cast Shin Ichijou: Junta Terashima (Tsukipro The Animation) Yukinojou Tachibana: Souma Saitou (Yuukoku no Moriarty) Taiga Kougami: Tasuku Hatanaka (Boku no Hero Academia) Kakeru Juuouin: Taku Yashiro (Seijo no Maryoku wa Bannou desu) Minato Takahashi: Ma...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Yozakura-san Chi no Daisakusen 2nd Season' Second Cour Announced for Fall 2026
The 12th and final episode of Yozakura-san Chi no Daisakusen 2nd Season (Mission: Yozakura Family Season 2) ended with the announcement of a second cour on Sunday. The official website also revealed an announcement promotional video. The second cour is scheduled to premiere on MBS and TBS in October 2026. Produced by Silver Link., the first season adapting Hitsuji Gondaira's action comedy manga aired in April 2024. Hulu it streamed with subtitles and later with an English dub, while Disney+...
